mapper.sql: id, attack_id, traffic_id, defense_type, defense_action, defense_target, defense_reason, expire_time, execute_status, execute_result, operator, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_defense_monitor ( attack_id, traffic_id, defense_type, defense_action, defense_target, defense_reason, expire_time, execute_status, execute_result, operator, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.attackId}, #{item.trafficId}, #{item.defenseType}, #{item.defenseAction}, #{item.defenseTarget}, #{item.defenseReason}, #{item.expireTime}, #{item.executeStatus}, #{item.executeResult}, #{item.operator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
